name: exec-recruiter
description: Personal executive recruiter for senior Product Leadership job hunts. Dual sourcing across LinkedIn AND major ATS domains, fit-scored triage, JD-tailored CV generation, contact-aware outreach drafts, approval-gated sends, meeting prep, and post-call debrief.
